title: God Armor
description: This plugin/mod gives you god armor with the command /armor or /armor giveall this is the most unique god armor plugin the best time to give out the armor are in events hosted by the server owner
body:
# ⚔️ ArmorAbilities

**A custom armor set with four powerful passive abilities — handed out from a simple GUI.**

Run `/armor`. Pick your piece. Wear it. Feel the difference.

No configs to wrestle. No permissions maze. Just gear that does what it says on the lore.

---

## 🛡️ The Set

Each piece is a **Netherite armor item** with a unique passive ability that activates the moment it's equipped.

### 🟡 Breaker Helmet
Insta-break any block you damage *(bedrock and nether portals excluded — balance matters)*.

### ❤️ Heart Chestplate
Boosts your max health to **30 hearts total**. Tank up.

### 💚 Speed Leggings
Extreme movement speed. The world blurs.

### 🩵 Feather Boots
Complete fall damage immunity. Jump from anywhere.

---

## ✨ Features

- One command: `/armor` opens a clean GUI
- Click an item — it goes straight into your inventory
- Abilities are **passive** — equip and forget
- Items are **unbreakable** and marked with persistent data tags
- Hidden attribute clutter — your tooltip stays clean
- Armor trims applied for a polished look
- Built on the modern **PaperMC API (1.21)** with Adventure components

---

## 🚀 Installation

1. Drop `ArmorAbilities-1.0.0.jar` into your `plugins/` folder
2. Restart the server
3. Run `/armor` in-game

That's it. You're done.

---

## 🎮 Compatibility

- **Minecraft:** 1.21+
- **Platform:** Paper / Purpur / Folia-likes that support the Paper API
- **Dependencies:** None

---

## 💡 Use Cases

- **SMP servers** wanting a fun mid-game reward tier
- **Minigame maps** needing instant ability kits
- **Creative worlds** where build speed and mobility matter
- **Testing realms** where staff need quick movement and breaking power

---

## 📜 Commands & Permissions

| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/armor` | Opens the armor abilities GUI |

No special permissions required by default — perfect for trusted SMPs or admin-only deployment with your favorite permissions plugin.

---

## 💬 Community & Support

Found a bug? Have a feature idea? Just want to hang out with other server owners running ArmorAbilities?

**Join the Discord:** https://discord.gg/zenith-minecraft-plugins-1231839725522915388

*Built for servers that want big abilities without a big config file.*
